meta.description: Optional deterministic answer-support overrides for retrieval evaluation.
notes: These labels are used only by investigation tooling; production retrieval behavior is unchanged.
Use overrides to add manually reviewed support checksums and explicit query benchmark classification metadata.
Answer-support scoring is checksum-label based in this step; similarity heuristics are suggestion-only.

Q01.notes: Manual label for an obvious multi-source factual query (PhD location).
